session.assistant:
All checks passed! Here is a summary of the `make fast-ci` results:
## Summary: All CI Checks Passed
### Lint Checks - **ruff**: All checks passed!
### Format Checks - **Format verification**: 1689 files already formatted - **Prettier**: All matched files use Prettier code style! - **Markdown**: OK
### Type Checking - **ty**: All checks passed!
### Reference Documentation - **Exec reference**: .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date
### Unit Tests - **erk tests**: 5984 passed with 2 deprecation warnings (in 14.33s) - Warnings: `'BaseCommand' is deprecated` in Click (non-critical) - **erk-dev tests**: 136 passed (in 5.84s) - **erk-statusline tests**: 115 passed (in 0.79s) - **erk-mcp tests**: 31 passed
### Metadata Verification - **AGENTS.md standard**: PASSED - **CLAUDE.md pairing**: All 19 CLAUDE.md files properly paired with AGENTS.md - **Violations**: 0
**Overall Status**: All tests passed, all formatting correct, no violations detected.
